message:
feat(cli): implement trust card and trust list commands with risk/revocation filtering

Wire up the previously stubbed Trust(Card) and Trust(List) CLI command
handlers with full functionality:

- Add parse_risk_level_filter() for case-insensitive risk level parsing
  (low/medium/high/critical) with clear error messages
- Add filter_trust_cards_for_trust_command() filtering by risk level
  and/or revocation status with sorted output
- Trust(Card) handler now fetches and renders a trust card by name
- Trust(List) handler supports --risk and --revoked filtering flags
- 6 unit tests covering valid/invalid/absent risk level parsing and
  combined risk+revocation filtering
- Update ambient_authority_findings.json for line number drift

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
